name: Compressor refrigerator
basis: 50 L class compressor refrigerator; duty-cycle energy, not nameplate power

name: Habitation lighting
basis: LED task and ambient lighting with non-coincident use

name: Fresh-water and outside-shower pump
basis: Intermittent diaphragm pump; peak allows start transient

name: Habitation ventilation
basis: Roof or wall ventilation operated more in summer

name: Monitoring diagnostics and HMI
basis: Local monitoring and diagnostics available continuously

name: Communications and local network
basis: Router and local network under an energy-management schedule

name: USB and small-device charging
basis: Phones, cameras, laptop DC charging and small electronics

name: Inverter standby and control
basis: Inverter normally disabled; allowance covers enabled idle periods

name: General 230 V user loads
basis: Short-duration user appliances; excludes cooking and space heating

name: Controls relays and distribution overhead
basis: Always-on controls, contactor and measurement overhead

name: Technical-bay extraction fan provision
basis: Not in daily baseline; included in continuous envelope pending thermal decision
